amount.description: Numeric value of the discount. Required.

discountEffect.description: Describes how the discount is applied: as a percentage, as an amount or as a direct amount. Required.

communicationChannel.description: Channel of communication with the customer. Currently supported values are None, Email and SMS.

phone.description: Customer phone number. Formatted according to E164 standard.

reasonCode.description: Reason code for the service order

serviceItem.description: Details of the item related to service

serviceLocationNo.description: Number of the service location where the service is provided.

technician.description: The technician assigned to the service order.

CreateOrderRequest.description: Might be changed to some kind of "upsert" request later.

customerDetails.description: Details of the customer who placed the order

DiscountDetails.description: The details of the discount applied to the related order line

discountEffect.description: Describies how the discount is applied: as a percentage, as an amount or as a direct amount

discountType.description: The type of the discount: Line, Subtotal, Group, CustomerGroup, ArticleBundle, Model, MemberPrice, CampaignPrice

quantity.description: The amount of the items that the discount applies to

ItemIdentifier.description: At least one item identifier is required

discount.description: The details of the discount applied to the related order line. Optional.

itemIdentifier.description: Identifier of the item that line accords to. Required.

lineNote.description: Note added to the line. Optional.

customerDetails.description: Details of the customer who placed the order

discountDetails.description: The details of the discount applied to the related order line

itemIdentifier.description: Identifier of the item that line accords to

PartsOrder.description: Customer order containing parts and service lines

discountDetails.description: The details of the discount applied to the related order line

itemIdentifier.description: Identifier of the item that line accords to

isAuthorizedOnly.description: Not yet supported. Do not use.

paymentMediaIdentifier.description: When paying with gift card, this is the gift card number.

paymentTerminalType.description: Payment terminal type. Possible values: None, Bopos, Baxi, SteriaPay, SpectraCard2, SpectraCard3, Sagem, Zaci, CashChanger, MultiTrade, PosPay, BaxiDotNet, PayLink, Mcash, MobilePay, NonIntegrated, Klarna, KlarnaCheckout, GltAera, Swish, Collector, ResursBank, AeviXPay, Vim, ResursBankFinance, Aera, Vipps, Instabank, Psdk, SoftPay, Svea, Adyen, Walley

receiptNo.description: Receipt number in following format: store-workstation-sequenceNumber

type.description: Type of payment: CreditDebit, Credit, Cash, GiftCard, Coupon, Finance, CreditNote

itemIdentifier.description: At least one item identifier is required

purchaseDate.description: Purchase date (date only, no timezone conversion should be applied)

receiptNo.description: Number of the receipt on which the service item was purchased

customerDetails.description: Details of the customer who placed the order

partsOrder.description: Order that contains all the services and parts

receiptNo.description: Number of the receipt on which the service item was purchased

serviceItem.description: Details of the item related to service

serviceLocationNo.description: Number of the service location where the service is provided.

serviceStatus.description: Status of the service. NotStarted, InProgress, OnHold, Completed, Cancelled

serviceType.description: Type of the service. Currently supported values are "Service", "Repair" and "InternalRepair"

info.description:
The Customer Orders API offers functionality for managing customer orders.

# Integration

See [general docs](https://docs.egretail.cloud/) for more information how to integrate with EG Cloud solutions.

Import and export documentation can be found in the drop-down menu in the top right of this page

## Health check

[Click](/hc) to see health check status.
info.title: Customer Orders API

schema.description: Might be changed to some kind of "upsert" request later.

application/*+xml.example:
<CreateOrderRequest xmlns:i="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/CustomerOrderV2.Contracts.Gateway.Orders">
  <CustomerDetails xmlns:d2p1="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/CustomerOrderV2.Contracts.Gateway.Common">
    <d2p1:Address>
      <d2p1:Address1>123 Main St</d2p1:Address1>
      <d2p1:Address2>Suite 100</d2p1:Address2>
      <d2p1:City>Anytown</d2p1:City>
      <d2p1:CountryCode>US</d2p1:CountryCode>
      <d2p1:PostalCode>12345</d2p1:PostalCode>
    </d2p1:Address>
    <d2p1:ContactInfo>
      <d2p1:CommunicationChannel>email</d2p1:CommunicationChannel>
      <d2p1:Email>johndoe@example.com</d2p1:Email>
      <d2p1:Name>John Doe</d2p1:Name>
      <d2p1:Phone>+11234567890</d2p1:Phone>
    </d2p1:ContactInfo>
    <d2p1:ExternalReference>EXTCUST001</d2p1:ExternalReference>
    <d2p1:Number>CUST001</d2p1:Number>
  </CustomerDetails>
  <ExternalNumber>356</ExternalNumber>
  <Lines xmlns:d2p1="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/CustomerOrderV2.Contracts.Gateway.Common">
    <d2p1:NewOrderLine>
      <d2p1:Color>Red</d2p1:Color>
      <d2p1:Discount>
        <d2p1:Amount>10</d2p1:Amount>
        <d2p1:DiscountEffect>Percent</d2p1:DiscountEffect>
      </d2p1:Discount>
      <d2p1:ItemIdentifier>
        <d2p1:ExternalItemNo>EXT123</d2p1:ExternalItemNo>
        <d2p1:MainGTIN>0123456789012</d2p1:MainGTIN>
        <d2p1:ProductId>PROD123</d2p1:ProductId>
        <d2p1:SKU>SKU123</d2p1:SKU>
      </d2p1:ItemIdentifier>
      <d2p1:ItemText>Item description here</d2p1:ItemText>
      <d2p1:LineNote>First line note</d2p1:LineNote>
      <d2p1:ModelName>ModelName</d2p1:ModelName>
      <d2p1:ModelNo>MOD123</d2p1:ModelNo>
      <d2p1:OriginalNetPrice>15.00</d2p1:OriginalNetPrice>
      <d2p1:OriginalUnitPrice>29.99</d2p1:OriginalUnitPrice>
      <d2p1:QuantityOrdered>2</d2p1:QuantityOrdered>
      <d2p1:Size>M</d2p1:Size>
      <d2p1:SupplierName>SupplierName</d2p1:SupplierName>
      <d2p1:SupplierNo>SUP123</d2p1:SupplierNo>
      <d2p1:Unit>Piece</d2p1:Unit>
      <d2p1:UnitNetCost>15.00</d2p1:UnitNetCost>
      <d2p1:UnitPrice>19.99</d2p1:UnitPrice>
      <d2p1:VAT>4.99</d2p1:VAT>
    </d2p1:NewOrderLine>
  </Lines>
  <OrderText>Order text here</OrderText>
  <ReferenceNumber>REF123</ReferenceNumber>
  <ReferenceText>Reference text here</ReferenceText>
  <Source>Online Store</Source>
  <StoreNumber>789</StoreNumber>
</CreateOrderRequest>

<Order xmlns:i="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/CustomerOrderV2.Contracts.Gateway.Common">

  <CustomerDetails>

      <Address1>123 Main St</Address1>
      <Address2>Suite 100</Address2>
      <City>Anytown</City>
      <CountryCode>US</CountryCode>

      <Phone>+11234567890</Phone>
    </ContactInfo>
    <ExternalReference>EXTCUST001</ExternalReference>
    <Number>CUST001</Number>
  </CustomerDetails>
  <ExternalNumber>356</ExternalNumber>
  <Lines>
    <OrderLine>
      <Color>Red</Color>
      <DiscountDetails>
        <Amount>0</Amount>
        <DiscountEffect>Percent</DiscountEffect>
        <DiscountType>Line</DiscountType>
        <PercentValue>10.0</PercentValue>
        <Quantity>2</Quantity>
      </DiscountDetails>
      <DiscountedUnitPrice>0</DiscountedUnitPrice>
      <ItemIdentifier>
        <ExternalItemNo>EXT123</ExternalItemNo>
        <MainGTIN>0123456789012</MainGTIN>
        <ProductId>PROD123</ProductId>
        <SKU>SKU123</SKU>
      </ItemIdentifier>
      <ItemText>Item description here</ItemText>
      <LineNo>1</LineNo>
      <LineNote>First line note</LineNote>
      <ModelName>ModelName</ModelName>
      <ModelNo>MOD123</ModelNo>
      <OriginalNetPrice>0</OriginalNetPrice>
      <OriginalUnitPrice>0</OriginalUnitPrice>
      <QuantityDelivered>0</QuantityDelivered>
      <QuantityOrdered>2</QuantityOrdered>
      <QuantityPaid>0</QuantityPaid>
      <Size>M</Size>
      <SupplierName>SupplierName</SupplierName>
      <SupplierNo>SUP123</SupplierNo>

    <d2p1:OffsetMinutes>0</d2p1:OffsetMinutes>
  </OrderDateUtc>
  <OrderText>Order text here</OrderText>
  <ReferenceNumber>REF123</ReferenceNumber>
  <ReferenceText>Reference text here</ReferenceText>
  <Source>Online Store</Source>
  <StoreNumber>789</StoreNumber>
</Order>

put.summary: Add an order line to an existing order and get this order

parameters.description: The order number for whose order lines the delivered quantity is to be changed
parameters.name: orderNumber

requestBody.description: An array of lineNo and quantity pairs, where lineNo is the number of an order line for which the delivered quantity is to be changed, and quantity is the quantity by which the current quantity is to be increased if positive, or decreased if negative. If a quantity not provided, the delivered quantity will be set to the quantity ordered.

parameters.description: The order number for whose order line the discount is to be applied
parameters.name: orderNumber

parameters.description: The order line to which the discount is to be applied
parameters.name: lineNo

application/xml.example:
<Order xmlns:i="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/CustomerOrderV2.Contracts.Gateway.Common">
  <CurrencyCode>USD</CurrencyCode>
  <CustomerDetails>
    <Address>
      <Address1>123 Main St</Address1>
      <Address2>Suite 100</Address2>
      <City>Anytown</City>
      <CountryCode>US</CountryCode>
      <PostalCode>12345</PostalCode>
    </Address>
    <ContactInfo>
      <CommunicationChannel>Email</CommunicationChannel>
      <Email>johndoe@example.com</Email>
      <Name>John Doe</Name>
      <Phone>+11234567890</Phone>
    </ContactInfo>
    <ExternalReference>EXTCUST001</ExternalReference>
    <Number>CUST001</Number>
  </CustomerDetails>
  <ExternalNumber>356</ExternalNumber>
  <Lines>
    <OrderLine>
      <Color>Red</Color>
      <DiscountDetails>
        <Amount>0</Amount>
        <DiscountEffect>Percent</DiscountEffect>
        <DiscountType>Line</DiscountType>
        <PercentValue>10.0</PercentValue>
        <Quantity>2</Quantity>
      </DiscountDetails>
      <DiscountedUnitPrice>0</DiscountedUnitPrice>
      <ItemIdentifier>
        <ExternalItemNo>EXT123</ExternalItemNo>
        <MainGTIN>0123456789012</MainGTIN>
        <ProductId>PROD123</ProductId>
        <SKU>SKU123</SKU>
      </ItemIdentifier>
      <ItemText>Item description here</ItemText>
      <LineNo>1</LineNo>
      <LineNote>First line note</LineNote>
      <ModelName>ModelName</ModelName>
      <ModelNo>MOD123</ModelNo>
      <OriginalNetPrice>0</OriginalNetPrice>
      <OriginalUnitPrice>0</OriginalUnitPrice>
      <QuantityDelivered>0</QuantityDelivered>
      <QuantityOrdered>2</QuantityOrdered>
      <QuantityPaid>0</QuantityPaid>
      <Size>M</Size>
      <SupplierName>SupplierName</SupplierName>
      <SupplierNo>SUP123</SupplierNo>
      <Unit>Piece</Unit>
      <UnitNetCost>15.00</UnitNetCost>
      <UnitPrice>19.99</UnitPrice>
      <VAT>4.99</VAT>
    </OrderLine>
  </Lines>
  <Number>123</Number>
  <OrderDateUtc xmlns:d2p1="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System">
    <d2p1:DateTime>2026-03-12T12:28:13.9500013Z</d2p1:DateTime>
    <d2p1:OffsetMinutes>0</d2p1:OffsetMinutes>
  </OrderDateUtc>
  <OrderText>Order text here</OrderText>
  <ReferenceNumber>REF123</ReferenceNumber>
  <ReferenceText>Reference text here</ReferenceText>
  <Source>Online Store</Source>
  <StoreNumber>789</StoreNumber>
</Order>

put.summary: Applies or replace a discount to an order line in an existing order and  returns this order

parameters.description: Store number in which internal repair will be created
parameters.name: storeNo

application/*+xml.example:
<CrateInternalRepairRequest xmlns:i="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/CustomerOrderV2.Contracts.Gateway.ServiceOrders">
  <ItemDescription>Description of the serviced item</ItemDescription>
  <ProblemDescription>Description of the problem</ProblemDescription>
  <ReasonCode i:nil="true" />
  <ServiceItem xmlns:d2p1="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/CustomerOrderV2.Contracts.Gateway.Common">
    <d2p1:BatchNo>123</d2p1:BatchNo>
    <d2p1:ItemIdentifier>
      <d2p1:ExternalItemNo i:nil="true" />
      <d2p1:MainGTIN>123</d2p1:MainGTIN>
      <d2p1:ProductId i:nil="true" />
      <d2p1:SKU i:nil="true" />
    </d2p1:ItemIdentifier>
    <d2p1:ItemText>Item name</d2p1:ItemText>
    <d2p1:PurchaseDate>2026-01-23T00:00:00</d2p1:PurchaseDate>
    <d2p1:ReceiptNo>222-222-222</d2p1:ReceiptNo>
    <d2p1:SerialNo>123456789</d2p1:SerialNo>
  </ServiceItem>
  <ServiceLocationNo>20000</ServiceLocationNo>
  <Source>Source system</Source>
  <Technician>user@example.com</Technician>
</CrateInternalRepairRequest>
